title: Ribbed Glass Flower Vase, Clear Cylinder Vases for Flowers, Tulips & Daffodils, 25 x 12 cm Elegant Glass Vase for Valentine’s Day, Mother’s Day, Birthdays and Home Décor
features: 【Stylish Ribbed Glass Design】– This ribbed glass flower vase isn’t just a vase; it’s a statement. The textured finish adds a touch of class to any bouquet, making your flowers feel like they’re at a posh party

【Durable Design, Timeless Elegance】– Made from high-quality glass, this vase is built to last, offering a stunning display for your flowers while complementing any home décor with effortless style. It’s elegance that stands the test of time

【Perfect for Tulips, Daffodils & More】– With its sleek 25 x 12 cm size and cylindrical shape, this vase is the perfect match for tulips, daffodils, roses, peonies, or even a cheerful bunch of wildflowers – because they all deserve a home that’s as chic as they are

【Versatile Beauty for Your Home】– Whether it’s your living room, hallway, or even the kitchen (for those who like to keep things elegant while making toast), this clear glass vase is the perfect bit of décor that complements just about any setting
【A Gift to Remember】– Looking for a gift that says " I’ve put thought into this " ? Whether it’s Valentine’s Day, Mother’s Day, or a Birthday, this vase will leave them speechless – in a good way
